title: Fix admin login flow: Go to Login button broken and full auth flow non-functional

requirements.text: Rewrite the AdminGuard component from scratch with a completely new, minimal implementation. The component must: (1) When the user is NOT authenticated — show 'Authentication Required' message and a clearly visible, fully functional 'Go to Login' button that directly triggers the Internet Identity login popup (calls the `login()` function from `useInternetIdentity`). The button must NOT navigate to a separate route — it must open the II popup inline. (2) After login completes successfully, immediately invalidate and refetch the admin-status query. (3) If authenticated and no admin is registered yet — show a 'Claim Admin Access' button that calls the backend `claimAdmin` function, handles all return variants, and on success redirects to `/admin`. (4) If authenticated and another admin is already registered — show 'Access Denied'. (5) If authenticated and current user IS the admin — render children. Do NOT use TanStack Router `navigate` for the login action; call `login()` directly.

quotes: Still not working and also if I click on go to login then this also not working why you are not fixing this why I am not able to admin login

acceptanceCriteria: Visiting /admin while unauthenticated shows 'Authentication Required' with a 'Go to Login' button
Clicking 'Go to Login' opens the Internet Identity authentication popup immediately without navigating away
After successful Internet Identity login, the admin-status query is immediately refetched
If no admin has been registered yet, a 'Claim Admin Access' button appears after login
Clicking 'Claim Admin Access' calls the backend claimAdmin function and redirects to /admin on success
If an admin is already registered and the logged-in user is not that admin, 'Access Denied' is shown with no claim button
If the logged-in user is the admin, the admin panel content renders correctly
The fix works correctly in both Safari and Chrome

requirements.text: Audit and fix the backend `claimAdmin` and `checkAdminStatus` functions in `backend/main.mo`. Ensure: (1) `claimAdmin` stores the caller's principal in `adminPrincipal` when it is currently `null`/`None`, and returns a clear `#success` variant. (2) `checkAdminStatus` returns `true` for that stored principal on all subsequent calls. (3) `claimAdmin` returns `#alreadyClaimed` if an admin is already set and the caller is NOT that admin. (4) `claimAdmin` returns `#notAuthenticated` for anonymous callers. (5) All variant tags are consistent and do not use mixed `__kind__`-style tagging. Add a `resetAdmin` function callable only by the current admin to clear `adminPrincipal` back to `null` for emergency recovery.

quotes: why I am not able to admin login

acceptanceCriteria: claimAdmin stores the caller's principal when adminPrincipal is null/None and returns #success
checkAdminStatus returns true for the stored admin principal on every subsequent call
claimAdmin returns #alreadyClaimed when an admin is already registered and the caller is not that admin
All variant tags are consistent (no mixed __kind__ tags)
resetAdmin function exists and clears adminPrincipal back to null when called by the current admin

requirements.text: Fix the `useActor` hook and any query initialization so that after Internet Identity login completes, the actor is immediately re-created with the fresh authenticated identity before any admin-status queries are executed. Ensure there is no race condition where `checkAdminStatus` is called with an anonymous or stale actor right after login. The admin-status React Query key must be invalidated and immediately refetched after both login and after a successful `claimAdmin` call.

quotes: if I click on go to login then this also not working

acceptanceCriteria: After Internet Identity login, the actor is re-initialized with the authenticated identity before checkAdminStatus is called
No race condition exists between auth state change and actor instantiation
Admin-status query is invalidated and refetched immediately after login completes
Admin-status query is invalidated and refetched immediately after a successful claimAdmin call
The flow works correctly on both first page load and on subsequent navigations to /admin

constraints: Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts or frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts — use safe wrappers or composition instead
Do not add a separate /login route — login must be triggered inline via the Internet Identity popup
Keep all Motoko logic in backend/main.mo
nonGoals: Changing the visual design of the admin panel
Supporting any authentication method other than Internet Identity
